subject: Switch QEMU build from make to ninja
description: build_qemu.sh: change `make -C $BUILD CFLAGS=... -j64` to `ninja -C $BUILD -j64`. QEMU 9.x is meson/ninja-based; the existing make invocation hits a dangling Makefile symlink to a nonexistent hybrid_qemu/ path. The CFLAGS hack is a no-op under meson and the warnings it suppressed are already off via --disable-werror.
